reasons: Tigreal groups enemies first, giving Zhuxin a better window to stack Soul Snare.
Zhuxin can extend the control chain after Tigreal's engage.

proof.summary: Tigreal starts grouped control, while Zhuxin continues the fight with Soul Snare capture and throw pressure.
worksBestWhen: Tigreal catches enemies inside Zhuxin's follow-up range.
Zhuxin holds Lantern Flare for the confirmed engage.
failureCases: Enemies spread before Soul Snare stacks.
Zhuxin is forced backward by dive pressure.

reasons: Atlas can pull enemies into one zone for Zhuxin's lantern pressure.
Zhuxin can apply Soul Snare more reliably after Atlas forces enemies together.

proof.summary: Atlas groups enemies, while Zhuxin follows with Soul Snare stacking and capture control.
worksBestWhen: Zhuxin is already close enough to apply Lantern Flare.
failureCases: Zhuxin arrives after the control window ends.
Enemy disengage tools break the stack timing.

reasons: Mathilda helps Zhuxin chase, reposition, or escape while maintaining lantern pressure.
Zhuxin gains more control value when mobility support helps her stay close enough to stack Soul Snare.

proof.summary: Mathilda gives Zhuxin mobility and shield support so she can keep enemies inside her control zone.
worksBestWhen: Mathilda saves Guiding Wind for Zhuxin's chase or retreat.
Zhuxin uses the mobility window to maintain Lantern Flare pressure.
failureCases: Mathilda uses mobility support before Zhuxin commits.
Enemy burst removes Zhuxin before stacks build.

reasons: Chip can bring teammates into the area Zhuxin is already controlling.
Zhuxin's capture and throw pressure gives Chip's portal fight a stronger control layer.

proof.summary: Chip turns Zhuxin's control zone into a fast team-collapse point.
worksBestWhen: Chip portals teammates after Zhuxin has started controlling space.
Zhuxin saves Lantern Flare for the portal timing.
failureCases: Chip opens the portal before Zhuxin is ready.
The fight moves away from Zhuxin's lantern area.
Enemies disengage before Soul Snare stacks.

reasons: Minotaur gives Zhuxin a stable frontline.
His control and sustain help Zhuxin keep applying lantern pressure without being forced out early.

proof.summary: Minotaur protects the front of the fight so Zhuxin can keep stacking Soul Snare.
worksBestWhen: Minotaur stands between Zhuxin and enemy divers.
Zhuxin plays behind Minotaur while stacking control.
failureCases: Zhuxin cannot maintain lantern contact long enough.
